name: More Vegetation + Terrain Textures
description: Remaining HIGH priority vegetation (9.6-9.8) + first terrain textures

assets.name: Dipterocarp Giant (9.6)
assets.prompt: Giant dipterocarp tree, massive straight trunk, buttress roots at base, wide spreading canopy high above, Vietnam old-growth tropical forest, side view, game asset sprite on solid red #FF0000 background, clean crisp edges for billboard cutout, painted art style, no shadows on background

assets.name: Banyan Tree (9.7)
assets.prompt: Large strangler fig / banyan tree, aerial roots hanging from branches, twisted gnarled trunk, dense dark canopy, Vietnam jungle landmark tree, side view, game asset sprite on solid red #FF0000 background, clean crisp edges for billboard cutout, painted art style, no shadows on background

assets.name: Bamboo Grove (9.8)
assets.prompt: Dense bamboo grove, tall green canes 8-12m high, characteristic nodes, narrow leaves at top, Vietnam highland bamboo, side view, game asset sprite on solid red #FF0000 background, clean crisp edges for billboard cutout, painted art style, no shadows on background

assets.name: Dense Jungle Floor Texture (8.1)
assets.prompt: Seamless tileable texture of dense jungle floor, fallen leaves in various stages of decay (brown, yellow, dark green), exposed roots, small ferns, dappled shade, overhead top-down view, 1024x1024, painted art style

assets.name: Muddy Trail Texture (8.2)
assets.prompt: Seamless tileable texture of muddy jungle trail, wet brown earth with boot impressions, puddles, scattered pebbles, flattened grass edges, overhead top-down view, 1024x1024, painted art style
